across.clue: A canvas is a thick piece of cloth that artists use to paint on.
To inflict means to cause something unpleasant.
An excess is an amount of something that is more than needed or wanted.
To oppose something means to dislike it or act against it.
To cooperate is to work with someone to achieve something that you both want.
If someone is redundant they have been told they must leave their job because they are no longer needed.
An olive is a small egg-shaped black or green fruit.
How someone acts toward others | ___ towards
To import means to bring in a product from another country.
To entertain someone is to do something that they enjoy.
A penalty is a punishment for breaking a rule.

down.clue: Muscle is a mass of tissue attached to bone that helps you move.
To insist means to be firm in telling people what to do.
A dominant person or thing is stronger than others.
A harbor is an area of water along a shore where boats land.
Pressure is what you apply to make someone do something.
An action that happens meanwhile happens at the same time as another action.
To improve a situation by correcting things that are wrong or unfair or make a system work more effectively.
I will guarantee that the loan will be repaid.
existing or happening inside an object a building or your body
